name: Maple Creme Brulée
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the heavy cream with the vanilla bean until warm; do not scald.
2. Whisk together the maple syrup and egg yolks. Gradually whisk in some of the warm cream to temper the yolks.
3. Add the tempered yolk mixture to the remaining cream and stir gently.
4. Pour into oven-proof ramekins or baking cups and bake in a water bath at 325°F until set, approximately 1 hour.
Yield: 6 deep custard cups
Note: This recipe is by Pastry Chef Pat Oliver of La Brioche Bakery in Montpelier, VT.
